Common Questions

Before You Visit

Everything first-timers and regulars ask.

How should I prepare my hair?

Come with clean, detangled, and completely dry hair. Wash the night before or morning of. Avoid heavy oils or products. Stretched or blown-out hair works best.

Do you provide the hair / extensions?

Many services include hair — knotless, box braids, feed-ins, Senegalese twists. For passion twists, kinky twists, crochet, and goddess/boho styles, you bring or purchase the hair.

How long will my braids last?

Most styles last 4–8 weeks with proper care. Cornrows 2–4 weeks. Box braids and knotless 6–8 weeks. Abla gives aftercare instructions.

Do you braid children's hair?

Absolutely! Abla loves working with kids ages 4 and up. She's patient and gentle. Kids' styles start at $60.

Where are you located?

Sola Salon Studios, 4040 Eagan Outlets Pkwy, Suite #33, Eagan, MN 55122. Open 7 days, 10 AM – 8 PM. Free parking.

What payment methods do you accept?

Cash, all major credit/debit cards, Apple Pay, and Cash App. Payment is collected after your service is complete.

More questions? See our New Client guide

Our Story

Meet Abla Tossou

The artist behind Peace Hair Braiding.

Every Braid Tells a Story.

Abla Tossou — known to her clients as Peace — brings the rich tradition of West African braiding to Eagan, Minnesota. With years of dedicated experience and a deep passion for her craft, she has built a loyal community of clients who return again and again.

"To God be all the glory. It's always my pleasure making my customers happy."

Operating out of her private suite at Sola Salon Studios, Abla offers a welcoming, comfortable space where great conversation flows as freely as her artistry. She is known for being fast, precise, gentle, and incredibly warm.

Book with Abla Follow on Instagram

Welcome

Your First Visit Starts Here

New to Peace Hair Braiding? Here's everything you need to know before your first appointment with Abla.

How It Works

3 Simple Steps

1

Tell Us What You Want

Fill out the form below. Abla will personally reach out within 24 hours.

2

Prepare Your Hair

Come with clean, detangled, dry hair. No heavy oils or products.

3

Relax & Get Styled

Arrive at our private Sola Salon suite. Free parking, Wi-Fi, great conversation.

Before You Visit

What to Know

Hair Included with Most Braids

Knotless, box braids, feed-ins, Senegalese twists come with hair. Passion twists, goddess braids, crochet — bring your own.

Appointments Take 1–8 Hours

Cornrows 1–2 hours. Knotless/box braids 3–5 hours. Goddess styles up to 8 hours.

Kids Are Welcome

Ages 4+. Abla is patient and gentle. Kids' styles from $60.

Braids Last 4–8 Weeks

Satin bonnet at night, light oil on scalp, avoid water week one.

Private Suite, All Yours

Sola Salon Studios — private, comfortable, free parking, Wi-Fi.

Investment

Starting prices. Final depends on length, thickness, complexity.
